remaining_blocker: The policy/head is trained and selected only on UCY train/val rows, but the underlying neural proposal, Stage37 floor, and teacher-repaired switch features are inherited from mixed external training. A full strict pure-UCY neural world-model retrain is still not complete.
caveat: This is UCY-only policy/head calibration over frozen mixed-trained neural proposals. It is dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D, not metric, true 3D, foundation, Stage5C, or SMC.
